title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 25 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 25/10/2022
Image reference: 2022-10-25_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-25-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have remained stable. Capesize Arethousa (170,600 DWT, Jun 2001, Sasebo) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 15.10 mil, VV Value USD 14.40 mil - BWTS fitted
Post Panamax BCs Jin Lang and Jin Mei (93,300 DWT, Jul 2010 & Mar 2010, Jiangsu New Yangzijiang) sold to Evalend Shipping for USD 34.5 mil, VV Value USD 33.72 mil - En Bloc. Panamax Arouzu (82,300 DWT, Mar 2012, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold to Unknown European for USD 25.00 mil, VV Value USD 23.67 mil - BWTS and Scrubber fitted.
